name: Bronya
desc: Heir apparent to the Supreme Guardian of Belobog.\nShe possesses pride befitting of a princess, but also the determination and integrity of a soldier.

1.name: Hone Your Strength
1.desc: When using Skill, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>fixed chance</u> of recovering 1 Skill Point. This effect has a 1-turn cooldown.

30000002.name: Fixed Chance
30000002.desc: Fixed chance will not be affected by any factor.

2.name: Quick March
2.desc: When using Skill, the target ally's SPD increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> after taking action, lasting for 1 turn.

3.name: Bombardment
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Take by Surprise
4.desc: After any other ally character uses Basic ATK on an enemy target that has Wind Weakness, Bronya immediately launches 1 instance of <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, dealing Wind DMG to this target equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of her Basic ATK DMG. This effect can only trigger once per turn.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

5.name: Unstoppable
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Piercing Rainbow
6.desc: The duration of the DMG Boost effect placed by the Skill on the target ally increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

110101.name: Windrider Bullet
110101.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Bronya's ATK to one designated enemy.
110101.simple_desc: Deals minor Wind DMG to one enemy.

110102.name: Combat Redeployment
110102.desc: Dispels a <u>debuff</u> from a single ally, allows them to immediately take action, and increases their DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhen this Skill is used on Bronya herself, she cannot immediately take action again.
110102.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Dispels</color> 1 <color=#f29e38ff><u>debuff</u></color> from a single ally, <color=#f29e38ff>increases the damage they deal</color>, and allows them to <color=#f29e38ff>immediately take action</color>.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

110103.name: The <unbreak>Belobog March</unbreak>
110103.desc: Increases the ATK of all allies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, and increases their CRIT DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Bronya's CRIT DMG plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
110103.simple_desc: Increases <color=#f29e38ff>ATK</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>CRIT DMG</color> of all allies.

110104.name: Leading the Way
110104.desc: After using her Basic ATK, Bronya's next action will be <u>Advanced Forward</u> by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.
110104.simple_desc: After this character uses Basic ATK, their next action will be <u>Advanced Forward</u>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

110106.name: Attack
110106.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

110107.name: Banner of Command
110107.desc: After using Bronya's Technique, at the start of the next battle, all allies' ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
110107.simple_desc: After this character uses Technique, increases all allies' ATK at the start of the next battle.

1.point_desc: The CRIT Rate for Basic ATK increases to <unbreak>100%</unbreak>.
At the start of the battle, all allies' DEF increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
When Bronya is on the field, all allies deal <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> more DMG.
